policy.note: This guard validates overseer coordination state. It does not record owner answers or change data-lane decisions.

findings.message: Overseer sync board must be ready.
Board must not record decisions.
Board must not write session files.
Board must not apply decisions.
Board must not write public files.
Board must not write public manifests.
Board policy must keep public-ready after board at 0.
Data lane must be review-only passed.
Data lane must report all steps passed.
Router must remain guarded review-only.
Night-loop checkpoint must remain guarded ready.
Session brief guard must pass.
Session brief guard failures must be 0.
Local worker review must be review-only present.
Local worker outputs must report all required outputs present.
Local worker high-risk hits must be 0.
Board must track eight latest handoffs.
Latest handoffs must have 0 mirror-missing files.
Board summary must keep public-ready at 0.
Board must track two handoff inboxes.
Handoff inbox must exist: /mnt/data/ArchitekturKosmos/Code/KosmoOrbit/_overseer/intake/inbox
Handoff inbox must contain files: /mnt/data/ArchitekturKosmos/Code/KosmoOrbit/_overseer/intake/inbox
Handoff inbox must exist: /mnt/data/ArchitekturKosmos/KosmoOrbit/_overseer/intake/inbox
Handoff inbox must contain files: /mnt/data/ArchitekturKosmos/KosmoOrbit/_overseer/intake/inbox
Latest handoff array must contain eight items.
Latest handoffs must include synergiebericht 115 or newer.
2026-06-14-codex-synergiebericht-154-source-root-owner-decision-packet.md must be mirrored in both inboxes.
2026-06-14-codex-synergiebericht-154-source-root-owner-decision-packet.md must include a title.

next_actions: Use the overseer sync board as the current Codex/Claude/KosmoOverseer coordination entry point.
Keep source-root, private inventory and owner-answer blockers in place.
Rerun board and guard after any new handoff or owner-confirmed answer.
